mapper.sql: id, grade_code, grade_name, enrollment_year, graduation_year, status, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO academic_grade (grade_code, grade_name, enrollment_year, graduation_year, status, remark) VALUES (#{gradeCode}, #{gradeName}, #{enrollmentYear}, #{graduationYear}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE academic_grade SET grade_code=#{gradeCode}, grade_name=#{gradeName}, enrollment_year=#{enrollmentYear}, graduation_year=#{graduationYear}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
UPDATE academic_grade SET deleted=1, update_time=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM academic_grade WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0
SELECT FROM academic_grade WHERE grade_code=#{gradeCode} AND deleted=0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM academic_grade ORDER BY enrollment_year DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}
SELECT FROM academic_grade WHERE deleted=0 AND status=1 ORDER BY enrollment_year DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM academic_student_record WHERE grade_id=#{id} AND deleted=0
